title: Trapped blocks outline
description: A resource pack that adds a bright red outline to the trapped blocks from the trapped blocks mod
body:
**Trapped blocks outline** is a resource pack that adds an basic red outline to the trapped blocks from the [Trapped blocks](https://modrinth.com/mod/trapped-blocks) mod.

This resourcepack is useless without the [Trapped blocks](https://modrinth.com/mod/trapped-blocks) mod, because that mod adds the trapped blocks.

New versions of this resourcepack will be released once there is a new version to the [Trapped blocks](https://modrinth.com/mod/trapped-blocks) mod.
